Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class ZonedDateTimeCheck

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.OrderedCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractTemporalCheck<ZonedDateTimeCheck,ZonedDateTime>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.ZonedDateTimeCheck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<ZonedDateTimeCheck,ZonedDateTime>
public final class ZonedDateTimeCheck extends AbstractTemporalCheck<ZonedDateTimeCheck,ZonedDateTime>
Fluent assertions for ZonedDateTime values. 

 checkThat(event).hasYear(2026).hasZone(ZoneId.of("UTC"));
 checkThat(meeting).isInTheFuture().isBefore(deadline);
